4 ?70 1101000000 3

Constant
4 C 4 1111111111 a mismatch
4 C 4n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 7
4 I 7 0111000110 5 mismatch
4 I 7n 1000111001 5 mismatch

Unary 0
4 I 0 1010000110 4 mismatch
4 I 0n 0101111001 6 mismatch

Binary 70
4 AND 70 0010000110 3 mismatch
4 AND 70n 1101111001 7 mismatch
4 OR 70 1111000110 6 mismatch
4 OR 70n 0000111001 4 mismatch
4 XOR 70 1101000000 3 match 1/1
all match XOR 70
4 XOR 70n 0010111111 7 mismatch
4 AND-NOT 70 0101000000 2 mismatch
4 AND-NOT 70n 1010111111 8 mismatch
4 OR-NOT 70 0111111111 9 mismatch

4 1101000000 3
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 0111000110 partial 1010000110 4
left 4
Starting at I 1 decreasing

right 5

4 I 0

Selected
0 I 3
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6
4 XOR 70
5 I 1
6 I 2
7 I 3

Applying to 01110001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 3 = 1
1 I 4 = 0
2 I 5 = 0
3 I 6 = 0
4 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(1,0) = 1
5 I 1 = 1
6 I 2 = 1
7 I 3 = 1

\boxed{10001111}
